name: User Authentication via PopKit Dev Workflow
description: Build OAuth authentication using /popkit:dev full workflow with Google and GitHub providers
prompt: Create a user authentication system with Google and GitHub OAuth providers. Use NextAuth.js patterns with a session-based approach. Include login/logout components and protected route handling.

Additional requirements.other: Include rate limiting on login attempts

standardAutoApprove: What would you like to do next.*

initialFiles.tsconfig.json:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{"name": "next"}],
    "paths": {"@/*": ["./src/*"]}
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

tests.name: Authentication files created
tests.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['src/lib/auth', 'src/components/auth', 'src/app/api/auth']; const exists=files.some(f=>{try{return fs.existsSync(f)||fs.existsSync(f+'.ts')||fs.existsSync(f+'.tsx')}catch{return false}}); process.exit(exists?0:1)"

tests.name: OAuth providers configured
tests.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const glob=require('path'); function findAuth(dir){try{const files=fs.readdirSync(dir);for(const f of files){const p=glob.join(dir,f);const s=fs.statSync(p);if(s.isDirectory())if(findAuth(p))return true;if(f.endsWith('.ts')||f.endsWith('.tsx')){const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(c.includes('Google')&&c.includes('GitHub'))return true}}}catch{}return false}process.exit(findAuth('src')?0:1)"

qualityChecks.name: No hardcoded secrets
qualityChecks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function check(dir){try{const files=fs.readdirSync(dir);for(const f of files){const p=path.join(dir,f);const s=fs.statSync(p);if(s.isDirectory()&&f!=='node_modules')if(!check(p))return false;if(f.endsWith('.ts')||f.endsWith('.tsx')){const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(c.match(/['\"](sk_|pk_|secret_)[^'\"]*/i))return false}}}catch{}return true}process.exit(check('src')?0:1)"

author: PopKit
